text: Ki Yennu nba por mɔb ki wann linba kur, li ji kii be doo maŋ ni; Yennu nan Pebik na naangbouŋ maŋ sii be doo maŋ ni, ki u toontunna na sii jiantirɔ.

ref: and will see him face to face. God's name will be written on the foreheads of the people.
text: Ki bi sa la u numm po, ki u sann sa sɔb bi yugbia paak.

ref: Never again will night appear, and no one who lives there will ever need a lamp or the sun. The Lord God will be their light, and they will rule forever. The Coming of Christ
text: Nyiɔk ji tan sii kaa, bi tan ji kii loon fitir nan yennu yentu leŋi, kimaan ti Yomdaanɔ Yennu sii tee bi yentu. Ki bi sa di naan kii be nan yoo nba kaa gbennu. Yisa baaru labaar

ref: Then I was told: These words are true and can be trusted. The Lord God controls the spirits of his prophets, and he is the one who sent his angel to show his servants what must happen very soon.
text: Ki malaka na bia yetin a “Mɔbona na tee mɔniie, ki bia tee linba ki yada be li ni. Ki ti Yomdaanɔ Yennu nba jikit u Seyeeŋ na ki teen u sɔkiniinba na, ŋɔɔe tun u malaka a wun baar ki wann u toontunna linba sa tun mɔtana.”

ref: Remember, I am coming soon! God will bless everyone who pays attention to the message of this book.
text: Ti Yomdaanɔ Yisa yet a “Gotir man, n baate mɔtana.” Tɔn, binba saak sɔkinii mɔmaan nba sɔb gbouŋ na ni na, parpeenn tee bi yare.

ref: My name is John, and I am the one who heard and saw these things. Then after I had heard and seen all this, I knelt down and began to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown it to me.
text: Min Jɔɔnne gbat ki bia la linba na kura. Ma gbat ki bia la na, li yooe ki n gbaan malaka nba wannin linba maŋ na tɔɔnn ki yaa n jiantɔ.

ref: But the angel said, Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you. I am the same as a follower or a prophet or anyone else who obeys what is written in this book. God is the one you should worship.
text: Ki u yetin a n daa tee nna kaa; a u mun tee min nan n naa waas nba tee sɔkiniinba nan binba saak linba be gbouŋ na ni na toontunlɔɔe; a n jiant Yennue.

ref: Don't keep the prophecies in this book a secret. These things will happen soon.
text: Ki u bia betin a n daa bɔrii sɔkinii mɔmaan nba be gbouŋ na ni, a kimaan yoo na pera;

ref: Evil people will keep on being evil, and everyone who is dirty-minded will still be dirty-minded. But good people will keep on doing right, and God's people will always be holy.
text: a wunba tuu tuun toonbiit, wun biar kii tuun nna, a ki wunba mun tuu tuun jakint toonn, wun mun biar kii tuun nna; ki wunba mun tuu tuun toonŋana, wun mun biar kii tuun nna, ki wunba mun tuu tee popeendaanɔ, wun mun biar kii tee nna.

ref: Then I was told: I am coming soon! And when I come, I will reward everyone for what they have done.
text: Ti Yomdaanɔ Yisa yet a “Gotir man, n baate mɔtana na, ki dia sɔɔ kur nan u toona nyɔɔt a n tan pau.

ref: I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
text: N tee Alfa nan Omegae, sinsinn nan joontu, pinpiik nan gbennu.”

ref: God will bless all who have washed their robes. They will each have the right to eat fruit from the tree that gives life, and they can enter the gates of the city.
text: Damm nba wuur bi para nan Yisa sɔn na, parpeenn tee bi yare; ki li paak ki bi mɔk sɔnu nba ki bi sa di tilɔɔna nba teen manfoor na, ki sa kɔɔ tammɔb na ni ki saan doo na ni.

ref: But outside the city will be dogs, witches, immoral people, murderers, idol worshipers, and everyone who loves to tell lies and do wrong.
text: Ki nibiit, nan binba dia jabaat na ki bu ki kpann niib, nan binba tuun jakint toona na, nan nikpiira, nan patjiantdamm, nan binba tee fai damm ki kpann niib na, bi kur tan sii be doo maŋ nanyer poe.

ref: I am Jesus! And I am the one who sent my angel to tell all of you these things for the churches. I am David's Great Descendant, and I am also the bright morning star.
text: “Min Yisae tun n malaka a wun tan fiit maan na ki tur n weira. Min Yisa nee tee David yaaboonn ki bia tee sanyafaar ŋmaajar nba nyɔkit na.”

ref: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” Everyone who hears this should say, “Come!” If you are thirsty, come! If you want life-giving water, come and take it. It's free!
text: Tɔn, Yennu Seyeeŋ nan Pebik na pooyookir na yet a “Baat.” Ki wunba gbatir mun-n yet a “Baat.” Ki wunba kur ki nyunyukiru soorɔ, wun baar; ki wunba loon nyun maŋ, wun gaar yann. Li gbennu labaar

ref: Here is my warning for everyone who hears the prophecies in this book: If you add anything to them, God will make you suffer all the terrible troubles written in this book.
text: Min Jɔɔnn kpaan wunba kur gbat sɔkinii mɔmaan nba be gbouŋ na ni nan nunmɔnn: wunba pukin siar mɔmaan maŋ ni, Yennu sa jii farbiit booru booru nba sɔb gbouŋ na ni na, ki pukin u tubdatu po.

ref: If you take anything away from these prophecies, God will not let you have part in the life-giving tree and in the holy city described in this book.
text: Ki wunba mun nyinn siar sɔkinii mɔmaan nba be gbouŋ na ni, Yennu sa nyinn u tor manfoor tiik na ni, nan Yennu doo na ni, ki bi sɔb li po gbouŋ na ni na.

ref: The one who has spoken these things says, “I am coming soon!” So, Lord Jesus, please come soon!
text: Tɔn, ki wunba tur siara na yet a “Mɔmɔmm, n baate mɔtana.” Mɔmɔmm, ŋaant ki lin teen nna. Ti Yomdaanɔ Yisa, baat na.

ref: I pray that the Lord Jesus will be kind to all of you.
text: Ti Yomdaanɔ Yisa sommir-ii be u niib kur ni. Mɔmɔmm.
